author: Caden McMann
name: Exact Sequence Matching + TTT on Old SOTA Base
blurb: Eval-time exact N-gram sequence matching (orders 8-12) stacked on top of TTT. Applied to the previous SOTA (PR #549, 1.1194 BPB), TTT alone reaches 1.1195, and sequence matching on top improves to 1.1177 (-0.0018 BPB additive). See companion PR for the same technique on the current SOTA base without TTT.
